image:image.image:title: Ahmad Abu-Hattab — Engineering Physics Student at McMaster University
image:image.image:caption: Ahmad Abu-Hattab reading at a restaurant in Toronto, Ontario. Engineering Physics student at McMaster University, CEO of City Centre Firm, and startup founder.

image:image.image:title: Ahmad Abu-Hattab Portrait — Startup Founder and Engineer
image:image.image:caption: Ahmad Abu-Hattab portrait. Startup founder and engineer based in Toronto, Canada. CEO of City Centre Firm and founding team member at Vosyn.

image:image.image:title: Ahmad Abu-Hattab Playing Basketball in Toronto
image:image.image:caption: Ahmad Abu-Hattab playing basketball in Toronto. McMaster Engineering Physics student and entrepreneur.

image:image.image:title: Ahmad Abu-Hattab Professional Headshot
image:image.image:caption: Ahmad Abu-Hattab professional headshot. CEO of City Centre Firm, Engineering Physics student at McMaster University, and STELCO co-op student.

image:image.image:title: Ahmad Abu-Hattab in Toronto
image:image.image:caption: Ahmad Abu-Hattab in Toronto nightlife. Engineer, entrepreneur, and McMaster University student.

image:image.image:title: Ahmad Abu-Hattab Toronto Evening
image:image.image:caption: Ahmad Abu-Hattab on a Toronto evening. McMaster University Engineering Physics student and STELCO co-op student in Operating Technology and Innovation.
